channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Celebrate Apple’s 50th birthday with these deals on watches and AirPods
item.description: We’ve been following Apple’s 50th birthday festivities, and Amazon is joining in on the fun with some deals on Apple Watches, AirPods and more.

item.title: Artemis II Mission Launches Successfully
item.description: The crew of Artemis II will not descend to the moon, but their capsule will fly over the far side of its surface.

item.title: ChatGPT comes to Apple CarPlay but only if you are willing to talk to a robot
item.description: Recent Apple iOS update introduces ChatGPT to the CarPlay environment for the first time

item.title: 7 new horror movies on Netflix, Shudder, HBO Max, and more in April 2026
item.description: April is packed full of great horror movies. Here are seven recommendations to keep you entertained this month.
